question.label: Stretch edge
question.name: What part of your work right now feels most like a stretch?
question.description: Finds where they are learning, overextended, or under-challenged in a concrete way.

answer: Growth-wise I think I'm flat. I'm the most senior IC on the team and there's no one really pushing me.

assessment.note: They explicitly said growth is flat and nobody is pushing them, signaling strong stagnation; no new wellbeing signal beyond the existing flatness.

new_queue.label: Next stretch
new_queue.name: What would actually make this role feel more stretching over the next month or two?

new_queue.label: Mentoring shape
new_queue.name: If mentoring is still something you want, what would you want it to look like in practice?

history.answer_excerpt: Last two weeks were intense — shipping payments was a sprint but it landed clean. Mostly good energy but definitely coasting a bit this week
Cleanup and docs for payments, reviewing PRs for the new team members. Not much stretching me right now.
I'd like to do more mentoring. I brought it up maybe three months ago and nothing came of it. I'm not pushing.
Honestly — the billing rewrite. I've heard whispers but nobody's talked to me about it directly. That's a bit weird.
Payments was real — I owned the migration plan and made the call on the dual-write window. I'm proud of how that went.
